METODO VISUALIZADOiterative

Celdas imputadas3,978
Celdas derivadas6,619
Joint antes68.3%
Joint despues100.0%
Los valores imputados no son observaciones astronómicas. Sirven para análisis exploratorio, Mapper/TDA y sensibilidad estadística. Toda conclusión debe compararse contra casos completos y contra varios métodos de imputación.
Algunas variables, como densidad planetaria, pueden ser derivadas fisicamente desde otras mediciones; estas no son observaciones independientes. En este dataset, pl_dens se reconstruye principalmente mediante masa y radio. iterative se visualiza como metodo principal porque obtuvo el menor rank promedio de error en la validacion enmascarada entre los metodos evaluados. La estabilidad topologica debe compararse contra complete cases y metodos alternativos.

Variables used

These are the variables that entered the numerical imputation matrix after identifier/reference filters.

pl_rade, pl_bmasse, pl_dens, pl_orbper, pl_orbsmax, pl_insol, pl_eqt

Excluded variables

No rows.

Validation By Masking

Derived/available values are hidden and reconstructed. Metrics identify whether validation targets were original observations or physically derived values.

method feature n_validated n_validated_observed_original n_validated_physically_derived validation_basis mae rmse medae mape log_mae log_rmse spearman pearson

Method Comparison

Lower validation ranks mean lower masked-validation error. This does not automatically settle topology.

method mean_mae_rank mean_rmse_rank n_columns_validated n_features_fully_imputed notes
median 2.857143 2.571429 7 7 Robust baseline. Topological stability is not inferred here; inspect Mapper outputs and bootstraps.
knn 2.142857 2.142857 7 7 Default for local-neighborhood Mapper; compare topology against complete cases. Topological stability is not inferred here; inspect Mapper outputs and bootstraps.
iterative 1.000000 1.285714 7 7 Lowest validation error among tested methods. Advanced sensitivity; may impose global relationships. Topological stability is not inferred here; inspect Mapper outputs and bootstraps.

Distribution Checks

Compare pre-imputation values with final values, then inspect final distributions by source.

Science-Space Scatter Checks

Points are colored by whether either plotted coordinate was observed, physically derived, or imputed.
